scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-confirmed against the live documentation markdown sources (https://open-platform.theguardian.com/documentation/md/{content_search,tag,section,edition,item}.md, fetched 2026-07-03): the Guardian Open Platform Content API publishes exactly 5 documented endpoint shapes (content search, tags, sections, editions, single item), all read-only, all covered by streams below. There is no write/mutation capability of any kind (the Open Platform is a public read-only content syndication API; write access is not offered to any API tier) and no other documented resource beyond these 5 shapes.

excluded.reason: deep-pagination continuation endpoint for the same /search record shape, addressed by a preceding item's id rather than page/page-size; the search stream's ordinary page_number pagination already covers the documented result set within the API's supported page-size range, and this endpoint returns the identical record shape search already emits
